name: aetna-drug
description: Aetna commercial specialty-drug (physician-administered, buy-and-bill) precertification. Exercises the drug-related Aetna overlay rules: R-PA-AETNA-011 flags the step-therapy request with no prior-trial documentation (wave 52-7c), and R-PA-AETNA-010 fires info for the J-code request with no NDC (wave 52-7b). R-PA-AETNA-001/002 pass (CPB cited, clinical note attached); 003 fires info; all other Aetna rules are vacuous for this packet.
